Read calcofi YAML blocks from ingest_*.qmd front matter

Source: R/wrangle.R
read_ingest_yaml.Rd

Reads the calcofi: block from the YAML front matter of each ingest_*.qmd workflow and returns it keyed by "\{provider\}_\{dataset\}". This is the authoritative source for dataset-level metadata, table ownership, workflow links, and ERD colors consumed by merge_metadata_json() and release_database.qmd.

Usage

read_ingest_yaml(workflow_dir, pattern = "^ingest_.*\\.qmd$")

Arguments

workflow_dir

Directory containing the ingest_*.qmd files.

pattern

Regular expression matching ingest filenames (default "^ingest_.*\\.qmd$").

Value

A named list keyed by provider_dataset. Each element is the parsed calcofi block, augmented with provider_dataset and qmd (the source file path). Ingests whose block lacks provider/dataset are skipped with a warning.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
ingest_yaml <- read_ingest_yaml("workflows")
names(ingest_yaml)            # "swfsc_ichthyo" "calcofi_bottle" ...
ingest_yaml$calcofi_bottle$tables_owned
} # }
